title: erigeron denalii
intro: Erigeron denalii, also known as Dandelion's cousin, or more specifically, Alpine Fleabane, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erigeron denalii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antihistamine. Erigeron denalii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal salves and creams to treat skin conditions and wounds.
